properties.description: Detects when the same user streams from multiple geographic regions within a short time window, indicating potential credential sharing.
properties.query:
// Custom streaming events table
let timeWindow = 5m;
let events = StreamingEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where EventType_s == "token_issued" or EventType_s == "stream_heartbeat"
    | project TimeGenerated, UserId_s, SessionId_s, ClientRegion_s, ClientIP_s;
// Find users in multiple regions within the time window
events
    | summarize Regions = make_set(ClientRegion_s), 
                IPs = make_set(ClientIP_s),
                SessionCount = dcount(SessionId_s),
                FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
                LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
      by UserId_s, bin(TimeGenerated, timeWindow)
    | where array_length(Regions) >= 2
    | extend RegionList = strcat_array(Regions, ", ")
    | project TimeGenerated, UserId_s, RegionList, SessionCount, IPs, FirstSeen, LastSeen

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: User {{UserId_s}} was detected streaming from multiple regions ({{RegionList}}) within 5 minutes. This indicates potential credential sharing or account compromise.
